fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the subclass that the fixed asset belongs to.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the fixed asset subclass.

fields.name: FA Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the class that the subclass belongs to.

fields.name: Default FA Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting group that is used when posting fixed assets that belong to this subclass.
